sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this simulation game

special_mechanics.name: Park Tour Mode
special_mechanics.description: Depending on platform, players can tour the park or individual rides. Movement mechanics are not specified in documentation.

special_mechanics.name: Visitor Movement
special_mechanics.description: Visitors arrive via bus and navigate the park. Visitor behavior is affected by customizable attributes (e.g., food properties affecting return visits), but specific movement parameters are not documented.

tier_notes: Theme Park is a construction and management simulation, not an action platformer. The source documentation focuses entirely on gameplay mechanics, park management, and business simulation systems. No character movement physics, gravity, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system data is documented. Player movement is incidental to core gameplay and not specified in available sources.
data_availability_note: This game is inappropriate for movement physics extraction as it is a management simulation game without documented character movement mechanics. No physics parameters could be extracted from available documentation.
